name: ship-captains-cabin
summary: The captain's quarters at the stern — a wide aft window, chart-strewn desk, a narrow bunk built into the bulkhead, personal trophies on every shelf.

primary_palette.note: chart-covered working desk — the cabin's hub
formal writing desk with ledger and quill

story_prompts: captain is missing — the log ends mid-sentence
a secret compartment in the desk holds a letter from the enemy admiral
mutineers occupy it now, the captain's effects smashed
the captain is alive, charming, and a vampire

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: warm interior (0.4-0.5) — lantern plus stern-window daylight

anti_patterns: don't use a wide doorway — ship doors are narrow and reinforced
bunk always against a bulkhead, never floating mid-floor
don't fill the floor — leave a cleared path from door to desk
